name: openpatch
description: Author safe, domain-scoped community repairs for broken websites with Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Author safe, tested community website repairs
interface.longDescription: Turn a concrete website complaint into a constrained OpenPatch repair, validate every selector and permission, and prove the behavior with browser tests before publication.
defaultPrompt: Use OpenPatch to repair this inaccessible form.
Create a safe mobile-layout patch for this page.
